# Boutique Diving Bali — Full Content

> Boutique Diving Bali is a premium personal diving concierge service in Indonesia, founded by Dominic Frei. Every diving experience is designed from scratch — no fixed packages, no group tours. Dominic is an SSI-certified professional based in Tulamben, Bali, serving clients across Bali, Komodo, Raja Ampat, and the Banda Sea.

## Services

### Basic Diver (/services/basic-diver)
Try scuba diving for the first time. The SSI Basic Diver program is a complete single-day experience for beginners — individuals, couples, and families (up to 4 people). Includes digital theory, confined water practice, and one open water dive to a maximum depth of 12 metres. From age 10. No prior experience needed. Everything counts as credit toward the SSI Open Water Diver certification within 6 months.

### Scuba Explorer (/services/scuba-explorer)
A pool-based introduction to scuba diving for children aged 8 to 12. Safe, supervised, and fun. This is not a certification — it is a first taste of breathing underwater in a controlled environment.

### Junior Open Water Diver (/services/junior-owd)
Full SSI Junior Open Water Diver certification for children aged 10 to 14. Private instruction at the child's pace. Maximum depth: 12m for ages 10-11, 18m for ages 12-14.

### Open Water Diver (/services/open-water)
SSI Open Water Diver certification for ages 15 and up. Fully private course with no group instruction. Includes digital theory, confined water sessions, and four open water dives. Maximum depth: 18 metres.

### SSI Specialty Courses (/services/specialty)
Advanced courses for certified divers: Deep Diving, Enriched Air Nitrox, Night and Limited Visibility, Wreck Diving, Navigation, and Underwater Photography. Each specialty includes the digital kit, private instruction, and open water dives at Bali's best sites.

### Scuba Skills Update (/services/scuba-skills-update)
Private SSI refresher course for certified divers who have not been underwater in a while. Review essential skills and rebuild confidence at your own pace before your next diving adventure.

### Custom Fun Dives (/services/custom-fun-dives)
Bespoke dive experiences for certified divers. Manta encounters at Nusa Penida, wreck exploration at the USAT Liberty, macro photography dives, night dives, drift dives, and coral garden tours. Tell Dominic your dream dive and he designs it.

### Dive Butler Service (/services/dive-butler)
The signature service. Dominic joins clients as their personal diving companion on liveaboard trips or at dive resorts anywhere in Indonesia. He handles all diving logistics — equipment, safety, planning, weather timing — so clients experience only wonder. Available for all experience levels.

## Destinations
- Bali (Tulamben, Nusa Penida, Amed, Padang Bai, Menjangan) — year-round
- Komodo National Park — May to October
- Raja Ampat — October to April
- Banda Sea & Beyond — expedition-grade, seasonal

## Pricing
All experiences are custom-quoted based on scope, duration, and group size. Indicative ranges: day diving from approximately USD 350, multi-day programs from USD 1,200, Dive Butler liveaboard accompaniment from USD 500 per day plus travel expenses.

## About Dominic Frei
Swiss national, SSI-certified diving professional, based in Bali since 2021. Background: Swiss Army instructor for an elite unit, decade in corporate risk and security management. First discovered diving in Panama in 2002. Spent three months researching the dive industry as a diving instructor and boatmaster in Koh Samui, Thailand. Speaks English and German. Contact: info@boutiquedivingbali.com, WhatsApp: +41 79 172 24 03.

## Partner
Ocean Sun Dive Resort, Tulamben — SSI Instructor Training Center. Dominic's home base for equipment, facilities, and confined water training. Owner: Ricardo.

## Key Facts
- SSI certified (not PADI)
- Concierge service (not a dive shop)
- All experiences are private (no group tours)
- Based in Tulamben, Bali — serves all of Indonesia
- Website: https://www.boutiquedivingbali.com
- Instagram: @boutiquedivingbali
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/dWZz5fu84wEpBcHD7
